mapper.insert: insert into coupon (coupon_code, discount, coupon_end, coupon_max, coupon_info, id) values ( #{coupon_code}, #{discount}, #{coupon_end}, #{coupon_max}, #{coupon_info}, #{id})
mapper.select: SELECT coupon_code, discount, coupon_end, coupon_max, coupon_info, id FROM coupon WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT coupon_code, discount, coupon_end, coupon_max, coupon_info, id FROM coupon WHERE coupon_code = #{coupon_code} and id=#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET discount = #{discount}, coupon_end = #{coupon_end}, coupon_max = #{coupon_max}, coupon_info = #{coupon_info}, id = #{id} WHERE coupon_code = #{coupon_code}
